message:
feat: add SIMD WebSocket masking and fix permessage-deflate

- Add shared SIMD XOR masking module (src/simd/mask.zig)
  - NEON (ARM64): 16 bytes/iteration
  - AVX2 (x86_64): 32 bytes/iteration
  - SSE2 fallback: 16 bytes/iteration
  - Handles unaligned data correctly

- Fix permessage-deflate decompression for libdeflate
  - Add 0x00 0x00 0xFF 0xFF + 0x01 0x00 0x00 0xFF 0xFF trailer
  - First 4 bytes complete BFINAL=0 block, next 5 bytes add BFINAL=1
  - Disable server-side compression (libdeflate != Z_SYNC_FLUSH)

- Disable deflate for panel WebSocket (video is pre-compressed)

- Add SIMD masking to Chrome CDP WebSocket client
